faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to frequently asked questions about SkillLinkup. Learn how our freelance marketplace works for both clients and freelancers.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using SkillLinkup as a buyer or seller
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.
faq.pay1Q: What methods of payment are supported?
faq.pay1A: SkillLinkup supports payments through Stripe, which accepts all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), as well as Apple Pay, Google Pay, and iDEAL for Dutch users. All payments are processed securely through Stripe Connect.
faq.pay2Q: How does SkillLinkup protect my payment?
faq.pay2A: We use an escrow system — your payment is held securely until the work is delivered and approved. If a dispute arises, our resolution process ensures both parties are treated fairly. Funds are only released to the freelancer once you confirm satisfaction.
faq.pay3Q: What are the fees for using SkillLinkup?
faq.pay3A: SkillLinkup charges a transparent 3.5% fee from both the buyer and the seller per transaction — that's it. No hidden fees, no monthly subscriptions, no upsells. You can see the full breakdown on our pricing page.
faq.pay4A: Once the client approves the delivered work, the funds are released to the freelancer's Stripe Connect account. From there, payouts to your bank account typically arrive within 2-7 business days depending on your country and bank.
faq.pay5A: If the work hasn't started yet, you can cancel the order for a full refund. If work is in progress or delivered, you can open a dispute through our resolution center. Refunds are handled case-by-case based on our terms of service.
faq.start1Q: How do I create an account?
faq.start1A: Click "Join" in the top navigation and sign up with your email address or Google account. Once registered, you can browse services, hire freelancers, or set up your own seller profile to start offering your skills.
faq.start2Q: How do I hire a freelancer?
faq.start2A: Browse or search for services in our marketplace. Once you find a service you like, click on it to see details, reviews, and pricing. You can then place an order directly or message the freelancer first to discuss your requirements.
faq.start3Q: How do I start selling on SkillLinkup?
faq.start3A: After creating your account, go to your dashboard and click "Become a Seller." Complete your profile, set up your Stripe account for payments, and create your first gig. Your service will be visible in our marketplace once published.
faq.start4Q: What is the difference between online and local services?
faq.start4A: Online services are delivered remotely — think web development, graphic design, or content writing. Local services are performed on-site in your area — like home repairs, cleaning, or photography. You can find both types on SkillLinkup.
faq.start5A: You can reach us via the contact page or email us directly at info@skilllinkup.com. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.metaDescription: SkillLinkup charges just 3.5% for buyers and 3.5% for sellers per transaction. No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Free to join.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No subscriptions. No monthly fees. Just 3.5% each for buyer and seller.
pricing.feeExplainer: buyer fee + seller fee per completed order
pricing.feeIncluded: Payment processing costs included — no extra charges
pricing.step1Desc: Create your account and profile at no cost. No credit card required.
pricing.step2Desc: Find projects, deliver great work, and get paid through our secure escrow system.
pricing.step3Desc: We only take a 3.5% fee from each side when the order is completed.
pricing.faq1Q: Is it really free to sign up?
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Creating an account, setting up your profile, and browsing projects is completely free for both freelancers and clients.
pricing.faq2Q: When do I pay the fee?
pricing.faq2A: The 3.5% seller fee is automatically deducted from the freelancer's earnings when the payment is released from escrow. The 3.5% buyer fee is added at checkout.
pricing.faq3A: No. The 3.5% on each side is the only fee we charge. Payment processing costs (Stripe) are included — we cover those. There are no listing fees, subscription fees, or withdrawal fees.
pricing.faq4A: Buyers pay the listed price plus a small 3.5% service fee. For example, on a €100 order the buyer pays €103.50.
pricing.faq5Q: Why is the fee so low?
pricing.faq5A: We believe freelancers should keep more of what they earn. As a lean platform, we can offer competitive rates while still providing secure payments and quality support.

becomeSeller.title: Become a Seller
becomeSeller.subtitle: Join thousands of freelancers earning on SkillLinkup
becomeSeller.metaDescription: Start selling your freelance services on SkillLinkup. Offer digital services online, get local leads, or find employment opportunities.
becomeSeller.heroSubtitle: Join thousands of freelancers and craftsmen on SkillLinkup. Offer your services online, get local leads, or find your next opportunity.
becomeSeller.threeWaysSubtitle: Choose one or combine all three. Your profile, your rules.
becomeSeller.onlineDesc: Create gig packages for design, development, marketing and more. Set your own prices and deliver remotely to clients worldwide.
becomeSeller.localDesc: Receive quote requests from homeowners in your area. Buy credits to claim leads and connect directly with clients.
becomeSeller.localF1: Pay only for leads you want
becomeSeller.jobsDesc: Browse job openings from companies looking for your skills. Apply directly and find your next career opportunity.
becomeSeller.stepsSubtitle: Three simple steps to start earning on SkillLinkup.
becomeSeller.step1Desc: Sign up for free and showcase your skills, experience, and portfolio. Add your location for local work.
becomeSeller.step2Desc: Clients find you through search, or browse open projects and quote requests to find work that fits.
becomeSeller.step3Desc: Get paid through our secure payment system. Online orders use escrow, local leads use our credit system.
becomeSeller.whySubtitle: Everything you need to grow your freelance business, in one place.
becomeSeller.benefitSecureText: Escrow protection for online orders. Your money is safe until work is approved.
becomeSeller.benefitFeesText: Competitive platform fees from 10-15%. Keep more of what you earn.
becomeSeller.benefitReputationText: Collect reviews, earn verification badges, and stand out from the crowd.
becomeSeller.benefitLocalText: Work from anywhere or serve clients in your area. You choose.
becomeSeller.benefitMessageText: Communicate directly with clients through our built-in messaging system.
becomeSeller.benefitAnalyticsText: Track your orders, earnings, and performance from one dashboard.
becomeSeller.ctaSubtitle: Join SkillLinkup today — it's free to create your profile.
becomeSeller.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
becomeSeller.faq1A: Yes, creating a freelancer profile is completely free. For online services, we charge a small platform fee (10-15%) only when you make a sale. For local leads, you buy credits to claim the leads you want.
becomeSeller.faq2Q: How do I get paid for online services?
becomeSeller.faq2A: Payments are held in escrow until the client approves your delivery. Once approved, funds are released to your Stripe account. We support bank transfers in most countries.
becomeSeller.faq3Q: How does the local lead system work?
becomeSeller.faq3A: Homeowners post quote requests for local services. You buy credits and use them to claim leads that match your skills and area. Once claimed, you get the client's contact details to reach out directly.
becomeSeller.faq4Q: Can I offer both online and local services?
becomeSeller.faq4A: Absolutely! Your profile can be set to remote, local, or hybrid. You'll appear in the relevant marketplace based on your settings.
becomeSeller.faq5Q: How long does it take to set up?
becomeSeller.faq5A: You can create your profile and start browsing opportunities in under 5 minutes. Add your skills, set your rates, and you're ready to go.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how SkillLinkup collects, uses, and protects your personal data. Our privacy policy covers cookies, authentication, analytics, and your GDPR rights.
privacy.breadcrumbBrief: Learn how we handle your data
privacy.section1p1: SkillLinkup B.V. (“SkillLinkup”, “we”, “us”) is a freelance marketplace based in The Netherlands. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect when you use skilllinkup.com, why we collect it, and how we handle it in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Dutch law.
privacy.section1p2: By creating an account or using our platform, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this policy. If you have questions, contact us at
privacy.section2AccountText: When you sign up or log in, authentication is handled by Clerk. Clerk collects your name, email address, and (optionally) a profile photo. If you use Google or another OAuth provider to sign in, Clerk receives the data your provider shares with us. We store your Clerk user ID in our own database to link your account to your marketplace activity.
privacy.section2ProfileText: Freelancers can add additional profile information such as skills, a bio, portfolio items, hourly rate, and location. Clients provide project descriptions and requirements when posting jobs or requesting quotes.
privacy.section2UsageText: We use PostHog to collect anonymised analytics including pages visited, features used, session duration, and general geographic region (country level). PostHog processes this data on our behalf and does not sell it to third parties.
privacy.section3p1: We use your personal data to operate and improve SkillLinkup. This includes: authenticating your account and keeping it secure; matching freelancers with relevant job opportunities; processing payments and managing escrow; sending transactional emails (order confirmations, dispute updates, earnings notifications); and resolving disputes between users.
privacy.section3p2: We may also use anonymised, aggregated data to understand how the platform is used and to improve features. We do not sell your personal data to third parties, and we do not use it for automated decision-making that produces legal or similarly significant effects without human review.
privacy.section4AuthText: Clerk sets session cookies that are strictly necessary to keep you logged in. These cookies do not track you across other websites and cannot be disabled without breaking login functionality.
privacy.section4AnalyticsText: PostHog places cookies to distinguish unique sessions and track user flows within SkillLinkup. We have configured PostHog to anonymise IP addresses and to respect Do Not Track signals. No data collected by PostHog is used for cross-site advertising. You may opt out of PostHog tracking by visiting our cookie settings or by using a browser extension that blocks analytics scripts.
privacy.section5p1: Payments on SkillLinkup are processed by Stripe. When you enter payment details, that information is submitted directly to Stripe and is never seen or stored by SkillLinkup's servers. Stripe is certified to PCI DSS Level 1, the highest standard for card data security.
privacy.section5p2: We receive from Stripe a transaction reference, the last four digits of your card (for display purposes only), and your payout account details if you are a freelancer connected via Stripe Connect. Your full card number, CVV, and other sensitive payment credentials are never accessible to us.
privacy.section6Intro: We share your data only with the third-party services required to operate the platform. Each provider acts as a data processor under a Data Processing Agreement:
privacy.section6ClerkText: Identity and authentication. Your login credentials and authentication tokens are stored and managed by Clerk. Clerk is SOC 2 Type II certified and stores data in EU-based infrastructure where available.
privacy.section6StripeText: Payment processing and payouts. Freelancers who accept payments connect a Stripe account; Stripe handles all financial data in accordance with their own privacy policy and PCI DSS obligations.
privacy.section6PostHogText: Product analytics. Anonymised usage events are sent to PostHog to help us understand feature adoption and platform performance.
privacy.section6ConvexText: Real-time data infrastructure. Marketplace data such as messages, orders, milestones, and gig listings are stored in Convex. Convex processes this data on our behalf and does not use it for its own purposes.
privacy.section7Intro: As a resident of the European Economic Area, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.section7AccessText: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you at any time.
privacy.section7RectificationText: You can correct inaccurate or incomplete data by updating your profile or contacting us directly.
privacy.section7ErasureText: You can request that we delete your account and personal data. We will do so unless we are legally required to retain certain records (e.g. financial transaction history for tax purposes).
privacy.section7PortabilityText: You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.section7ObjectionText: You can object to processing based on legitimate interests or withdraw consent where processing is based on consent. To exercise any of these rights, email us at
privacy.section7ResponseTime: We will respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens) at autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl.
privacy.section8p1: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. If you close your account, we delete your personal profile data within 90 days. We retain financial transaction records for seven years to comply with Dutch bookkeeping requirements (Wet op de jaarrekening).
privacy.section8p2: Anonymised analytics data collected via PostHog may be retained indefinitely as it cannot be linked back to an individual.
privacy.section9p1: We take technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, or disclosure. These include encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), row-level security in our database, multi-tenant data isolation, and access controls limiting which team members can view user data.
privacy.section9p2: Authentication is delegated to Clerk, which provides features such as multi-factor authentication, bot protection, and anomaly detection. Despite these measures, no system is completely secure. If you suspect a security issue, please contact us immediately at
privacy.section10Text: SkillLinkup is intended for users aged 13 and older. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we become aware that a user is under 13, we will promptly close the account and delete the associated data. If you believe a child under 13 has registered on our platform, please contact us at
privacy.section11Text: We may update this Privacy Policy when we introduce new features, change our service providers, or when laws require it. We will notify registered users of material changes by email or by displaying a prominent notice on the platform. The “Last updated” date at the top of this page always reflects the most recent version. Continued use of SkillLinkup after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.section12Text: For privacy-related questions, data requests, or complaints, contact us at
privacy.section12Suffix: SkillLinkup is registered in The Netherlands. We aim to respond to all privacy enquiries within 5 business days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Read the SkillLinkup terms of service. Understand the rules and guidelines that govern use of our freelance marketplace platform.
terms.breadcrumbBrief: Rules and guidelines for using SkillLinkup
terms.section1p1: Welcome to SkillLinkup. By accessing or using our platform at skilllinkup.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. SkillLinkup is a marketplace that connects freelancers with clients seeking professional services.
terms.section1p2: If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our platform. We may update these terms from time to time, and continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.section2p1: To use certain features of SkillLinkup, you must create an account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration and to keep your account credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.section2p2: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. Each person may only maintain one account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section3p1: Freelancers on SkillLinkup are independent contractors, not employees of SkillLinkup. Freelancers are solely responsible for the quality and delivery of their services, including compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
terms.section3p2: SkillLinkup does not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of services offered by freelancers. Clients are encouraged to review freelancer profiles, ratings, and reviews before engaging their services.
terms.section4p1: All payments between clients and freelancers are processed through our secure payment system. SkillLinkup uses an escrow system to protect both parties: funds are held until the client confirms satisfactory delivery of services.
terms.section4p2: SkillLinkup charges a service fee on transactions. Fee rates are displayed before you confirm any payment. Freelancers receive their earnings after the service fee is deducted and the client approves the work.
terms.section5p1: If a dispute arises between a client and freelancer, SkillLinkup provides a dispute resolution process. Both parties are encouraged to resolve issues directly first. If no resolution is reached, SkillLinkup may mediate and make a final decision.
terms.section5p2: Refunds may be issued at SkillLinkup's discretion based on the circumstances of the dispute, including evidence of non-delivery, significant quality issues, or breach of the agreed scope of work.
terms.section6Text: You agree not to: (a) use the platform for any illegal purpose; (b) harass, abuse, or harm other users; (c) post false, misleading, or fraudulent content; (d) attempt to circumvent our payment system; (e) scrape or collect user data without consent; (f) upload malicious code or interfere with platform operations; (g) create multiple accounts to manipulate ratings or reviews.
terms.section7p1: Unless otherwise agreed in writing, intellectual property rights for work completed through SkillLinkup transfer to the client upon full payment. Freelancers retain the right to display completed work in their portfolio unless the client requests otherwise.
terms.section7p2: SkillLinkup's own branding, logos, and platform content are protected by intellectual property laws and may not be used without our written permission.
terms.section8Text: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy. By using SkillLinkup, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.section9Text: SkillLinkup provides the platform “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability is limited to the fees paid to SkillLinkup in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms.section10Text: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at

affiliateDisclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliateDisclosure.metaDescription: Learn how SkillLinkup earns revenue through affiliate partnerships. We believe in full transparency about how we fund our freelance platform comparison content.
affiliateDisclosure.section1p1: SkillLinkup is a free resource that provides freelance platform comparisons, reviews, and educational content. We earn revenue through affiliate marketing, which means we may receive a commission when you sign up for a freelance platform through our links.
affiliateDisclosure.section1p2: Using our affiliate links does not cost you anything extra. The platforms we link to pay us a referral fee from their own marketing budget.
affiliateDisclosure.section2p1: When you click on a link to a freelance platform on SkillLinkup and subsequently create an account or make a purchase, we may receive a commission from that platform. This commission helps us keep our content free and up to date.
affiliateDisclosure.section2p2: You pay the same price whether you use our links or go directly to the platform. Our affiliate partnerships never add any extra cost to you.
affiliateDisclosure.section3p1: Affiliate relationships do not influence our editorial content. We are committed to providing honest, unbiased comparisons. Here is how we maintain that integrity:
affiliateDisclosure.section3li1: Our ratings and reviews are based on our own research and analysis, not on commission rates.
affiliateDisclosure.section3li2: We include platforms in our comparisons even if they do not have an affiliate program.
affiliateDisclosure.section3li3: We highlight both the strengths and weaknesses of every platform we review.
affiliateDisclosure.section3li4: We regularly update our content to ensure accuracy, regardless of affiliate status.
affiliateDisclosure.section4p1: In accordance with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) guidelines, we disclose that SkillLinkup may receive compensation when you click on links and sign up for services featured on our site.
affiliateDisclosure.section4p2: This compensation may affect which platforms we write about, where they appear on the site, and in what order. However, our editorial standards and review methodology remain independent of our affiliate relationships.
affiliateDisclosure.section5p1: In addition to affiliate links, SkillLinkup may display advertisements. These ads are clearly distinguishable from our editorial content and do not influence our reviews or comparisons.
affiliateDisclosure.section5p2: Advertising revenue helps fund our ongoing research and content creation efforts.
affiliateDisclosure.section6p1: If you have any questions about our affiliate relationships or how we make money, please contact us at

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.metaDescription: Learn how SkillLinkup uses cookies and similar technologies. This policy explains what cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can manage your preferences.
cookiePolicy.section1p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or smartphone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the website owners.
cookiePolicy.section1p2: This Cookie Policy explains how SkillLinkup (skilllinkup.com) uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website.
cookiePolicy.section2EssentialText: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic features like page navigation, language preferences, and access to secure areas. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookiePolicy.section2AnalyticsText: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies collect information anonymously and help us improve the user experience. We use services such as Google Analytics for this purpose.
cookiePolicy.section2PreferenceText: These cookies remember your settings and preferences, such as your chosen language and dark/light mode. They help provide a more personalized experience on return visits.
cookiePolicy.section2AdvertisingText: We may use advertising cookies to deliver relevant advertisements and to track the effectiveness of our ad campaigns. These cookies may be set by third-party advertising partners.
cookiePolicy.section3p1: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences in the following ways:
cookiePolicy.section3li1: Browser settings: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can set your browser to refuse cookies or to alert you when cookies are being sent.
cookiePolicy.section3li2: Opt-out links: For Google Analytics, you can install the Google Analytics opt-out browser add-on at https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.
cookiePolicy.section3li3: Ad personalization: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings at https://www.google.com/settings/ads.
cookiePolicy.section4p1: Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these third-party cookies. The main third-party services we use include Google Analytics for website traffic analysis and advertising partners for displaying relevant ads.
cookiePolicy.section4p2: These third-party services have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them.
cookiePolicy.section5p1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal, regulatory, or operational reasons.
cookiePolicy.section5p2: Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
cookiePolicy.section6p1: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at

editorialPolicy.title: Editorial Policy
editorialPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about SkillLinkup's editorial standards, content creation process, and commitment to providing accurate, unbiased freelance platform comparisons.
editorialPolicy.section1p1: SkillLinkup is an independent freelance platform comparison site and blog. Our mission is to help freelancers, independent professionals, and businesses find the right platforms for their needs by providing honest, well-researched comparisons and educational content.
editorialPolicy.section1p2: We are committed to editorial integrity and transparency in everything we publish.
editorialPolicy.section2p1: All content published on SkillLinkup adheres to the following standards:
editorialPolicy.section2li1: Accuracy: We verify facts and data before publishing. When information changes, we update our content accordingly.
editorialPolicy.section2li2: Honesty: We present both the advantages and disadvantages of every platform we review. We do not hide flaws to benefit affiliate partners.
editorialPolicy.section2li3: Transparency: We clearly disclose affiliate relationships and how we earn revenue. See our Affiliate Disclosure for details.
editorialPolicy.section2li4: Originality: Our content is based on our own research, analysis, and experience. We do not copy or plagiarize from other sources.
editorialPolicy.section2li5: Relevance: We focus on information that is useful and actionable for our audience of freelancers and independent professionals.
editorialPolicy.section3p1: Our editorial team researches freelance platforms by evaluating their features, pricing, user experience, payment terms, and community feedback. We draw on publicly available information, official platform documentation, and real user experiences.
editorialPolicy.section3p2: We regularly revisit and update our content to ensure it remains accurate as platforms evolve and change their offerings.
editorialPolicy.section4p1: While SkillLinkup earns revenue through affiliate partnerships and advertising, our editorial decisions are made independently. Affiliate commissions and ad revenue do not determine which platforms we review, how we rate them, or what we recommend.
editorialPolicy.section4p2: A platform with a higher affiliate commission will never receive a better rating solely because of that commission. Our ratings reflect the actual quality and value of each platform based on our research.
editorialPolicy.section5p1: We take accuracy seriously. If we discover an error in our content, we correct it promptly and note the correction where appropriate.
editorialPolicy.section5p2: If you notice any inaccuracies in our content, we encourage you to let us know so we can investigate and make corrections.
editorialPolicy.section6p1: We strive to demonstrate Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness (E-E-A-T) in all our content. Our editorial team has practical experience with freelance platforms and the freelance industry.
editorialPolicy.section6p2: We are transparent about who we are and how we operate. We do not use fake team member profiles or fabricated credentials.
editorialPolicy.section7p1: If you have questions about our editorial process, want to suggest a correction, or have feedback about our content, please contact us at

authorsTeam.title: Our Editorial Team
authorsTeam.metaDescription: Meet the editorial team behind SkillLinkup. Learn about our commitment to providing honest, well-researched freelance platform comparisons and content.
authorsTeam.subtitle: The people behind SkillLinkup's freelance platform comparisons and content.
authorsTeam.section1p1: SkillLinkup is run by a small, dedicated editorial team passionate about the freelance economy. We are freelancers and independent professionals ourselves, which gives us firsthand understanding of the challenges and opportunities in finding the right platforms to work with.
authorsTeam.section1p2: We do not use fake team member profiles or fabricated credentials. We are a lean team focused on delivering quality, honest content rather than creating an impression of being larger than we are.
authorsTeam.section2p1: Our editorial team is responsible for:
authorsTeam.section2li1: Researching and comparing freelance platforms across categories like design, development, writing, marketing, and more.
authorsTeam.section2li2: Writing in-depth reviews and comparison articles based on our research and experience.
authorsTeam.section2li3: Keeping our content up to date as platforms change their features, pricing, and policies.
authorsTeam.section2li4: Creating educational blog content to help freelancers succeed in their careers.
authorsTeam.section3p1: Our team brings practical experience in the freelance industry. This includes:
authorsTeam.section3li1: Years of experience working with various freelance platforms as both freelancers and clients.
authorsTeam.section3li2: Understanding of different freelance business models, payment structures, and platform ecosystems.
authorsTeam.section3li3: Knowledge of the tools and technologies that freelancers use daily.
authorsTeam.section3li4: Ongoing research into industry trends, new platforms, and changing market conditions.
authorsTeam.section4p1: Every piece of content on SkillLinkup goes through a review process to ensure accuracy, fairness, and usefulness. We fact-check claims, verify pricing information, and confirm feature availability before publishing.
authorsTeam.section4p2: For more details on how we maintain quality and integrity in our content, see our Editorial Policy.
authorsTeam.section5p1: If you would like to reach our editorial team with questions, corrections, or content suggestions, please contact us at

howItWorks.title: A platform built network-first.
howItWorks.subtitle: We're not pretending to be live yet. Here's what happens between now and launch.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Join the waitlist and tell us what you offer — design, development, writing, whatever you're great at.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We assemble the network before going live — so day one has real freelancers, real clients, real demand.
howItWorks.step3Desc: When we hit critical mass, everyone on the waitlist gets the launch email. No marketing spam in between.

ctaBanner.title: Online, local, jobs — pick your world.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Everything that connects skill and need — in one place. Join the waitlist to be part of day one.
ctaBanner.b1: Built network-first — day one with real demand
ctaBanner.b2: One place for online, local, and jobs
ctaBanner.b4: No spam between now and launch
